jobs.title: MARCHESI 1824 - Commis De Rang | Torre
jobs.description:
Marchesi 1824 segna l’ingresso del Gruppo Prada nel mondo Food and Beverage; le pasticcerie Marchesi, sinonimo di tradizione e storicità milanese, si affiancano a Bar Luce e Ristorante Torre, locations che coniugano arte e ristorazione all’interno degli spazi di Fondazione Prada. 

 
 Storia e tradizione si fondono con creatività e innovazione; il talento e la passione delle nostre persone contribuiscono a creare un servizio d’eccellenza e un prodotto di altissima qualità, elementi cardine per offrire ai clienti un’esperienza unica. 

 
 

 
 

 
 
 SCOPO 

 
 Con grande attenzione ai dettagli e profonda conoscenza del DNA di Prada Group e Marchesi 1824, sappia offrire un’accoglienza impeccabile ai clienti occupandosi della gestione impeccabile di una sezione della sala, garantendo un servizio personalizzato ai clienti.

 
 Questa figura assicurerà che ogni fase dell’esperienza dell’ospite sia caratterizzata da eccellenza e in linea con gli standard del gruppo Prada e di Marchesi 1824.

 
 

 
 RESPONSABILITA’ 

 
 
 Accoglienza e Client Journey: Garantire un’accoglienza empatica e professionale, accompagnando il cliente durante tutta l’esperienza, assicurando che ogni fase del servizio rifletta gli standard del gruppo Prada e che il cliente si senta parte di un’esperienza unica e curata nei minimi dettagli;
 
 
 
 Conoscenza del Brand e del Contesto: Acquisire e mantenere una conoscenza approfondita della storia, della cultura e del DNA di Marchesi 1824, per trasmettere con passione queste informazioni agli ospiti attraverso uno storytelling coinvolgente;

 
 Food Experience: Possedere una comprensione approfondita dei prodotti, delle sue caratteristiche al fine di assistere e consigliare i clienti, rispondendo in modo esaustivo e facendo proposte. Si mantiene costantemente aggiornato sulle novità di prodotto e sulla performance generali di vendita, conosce il settore del lusso e della ristorazione; 
 
 Personalizzazione e Attenzione ai Dettagli: Identificare le esigenze specifiche di ogni cliente, garantendo un approccio personalizzato che risponda prontamente a richieste speciali, preferenze o esigenze, mantenendo sempre un’attitudine proattiva e risolutiva. 
 
 
 

 
 REQUISITI 

 
 Esperienza consolidata nel ruolo in contesti di ristorazione.

 
 Conoscenza approfondita delle tecniche di servizio alla francese, italiana o internazionale.

 
 Passione e interesse verso il settore food. 

 
 Ottime capacità comunicative e relazionali, con un naturale orientamento al cliente e all’attenzione ai dettagli. 

 
 Capacità di gestire situazioni dinamiche e complesse mantenendo sempre un atteggiamento professionale e cortese. 

 
 Buone capacità organizzative e di gestione del tempo per gestire il flusso di clienti. 

 
 Rispetto delle linee guida di grooming richieste dal contesto. 

 
 Flessibilità oraria, inclusi turni nei weekend e festivi, e disponibilità a partecipare ad eventi e iniziative speciali. 

 
 Conoscenza della lingua inglese.

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 
 

 
 Entrare a far parte della nostra Azienda significa lavorare in un ambiente creativo e internazionale, con team di persone motivate dalla curiosità e dalla ricerca dell'eccellenza. Il motore del nostro successo è l'importanza e il valore che diamo al talento e alla passione delle nostre persone, favorendone la crescita professionale. 
 Il Gruppo Prada promuove un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo, garantendo pari opportunità a tutti i candidati, indipendentemente da genere, etnia, orientamento sessuale, disabilità, o altre caratteristiche personali. Crediamo che la diversità sia un valore e ci impegniamo a costruire un ambiente di lavoro equo e rispettoso per tutti.

jobs.title: PRADA In Store Client Development, Milan

titleByLocale.fr: PRADA In Store Client Development, Milan

jobs.description:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. 

 
 

 
 

 JOB PURPOSE 

 
 

 
 To be the ambassador of the Brand and a key contributor to the client development and sales performance in the store. To support the store staff in recruiting new customers and in strengthening the relation with the existing, in particular the VICs. To contribute to the store results by impacting the quality of the customer journey, building client loyalty to the brand and supporting long term effective relationship, developing the Sales Staff skills (clienteling and customer service) as well as you own portfolio of client. 

 
 

 
 

 
 RESPONSIBILITIES 

 
 

 
 
 Support Sales staff in all their clienteling activities and ensure all of them are trained on and actively use available clienteling tools when appropriate in order to optimize Client benefit. 
 
 Lead by example in the management of your own portfolio of Clients, demonstrating best in class clienteling actions. 
 
 Analyze different shopping behaviors and approach potential clients by their preferred channels. 
 
 Keep the team informed of digital activities and encourage them to proactively use digital tools when appropriate in order to maximize Client benefit. 
 
 In collaboration with store Managers and training department, focus on sales staff needs to reinforce key knowledge and skills.Continuously keen on developing your own portfolio of clients. 
 
 Foster company action plans and proactively propose ad hoc initiatives to support the store target achievement. 
 
 Support the Store Manager in setting Staff individual targets for Client repurchase. 
 
 Proactively propose and organize activities and targeted actions for individual Clients and Client groups. 
 
 Develop and grow the made-to-measure program. 
 
 Provide qualitative feedback to Store and local corporate Function on clients requests. 
 
 Analyze and select right customer profile to achieve individual event target . Support the Sales Staff and directly intervene in case of a “tricky situation” happens with a VIC. 
 
 Foster a deep Brand and product knowledge as a key contribution to the service. 
 
 Respect and foster the Company standards in terms of grooming and behavior. 
 
 Act as a contact point for clienteling operations and between stores for Clients buying in multiple stores (MTM event etc). 
 
 Assist both stylists and celebrities on behalf of PR in their absence as requested whether for purchase, loan, or gifting. 
 
 Finds “special” merchandise for clients including one of a kind samples. 
 
 Oversees all aspects of the transaction including alterations, special handling, delivery, etc.Liaison with corporate Public Relations Department for servicing VIP clients. 
 
 In collaboration with the local corporate Function, propose and manage events and special experiences for VICs. 
 
 Accompany the VICs to Brand / Company events /lunches etc. 
 
 Be available for appointments on/off site, special engagements, travel as needed. 
 
 Participate in external events for clienteling activities and recruiting new clients. 
 
 Have a good understanding of the market and consumer trends in order to enhance the shop staff fashion sense. 
 
 Serve as a brand ambassador for clients and celebrities that enter the boutique. 
 
 Maintains strong ability to grow and build community involvement with outreach to clients, charities events etc. 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS 

 
 

 
 Business driven 

 
 Leadership and ability to motivate and influence people 

 
 Strong customer service mindset 

 
 Natural ability to welcome our client 

 
 Confident, enthusiastic and positive 

 
 Mature and assertive 

 
 Market and product knowledge/passion 

 
 Business/Retail Management degree or equivalent is a plus 

 
 Interest in luxury/fashion, art and design 

 
 Fluent spoken English expected. Other languages are desirable 

 

 
 

 
 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. 
 Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

jobs.title: Internal Auditor

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Fondato nel 1913 in Italia, il Gruppo Prada si basa su una tradizione di eccellenza e su una visione innovativa. Il Gruppo, leader mondiale nel settore del lusso, opera in oltre 45 paesi con i marchi PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe e Luna Rossa, e conta dipendenti di oltre 100 nazionalità. ## Mansioni - Supportare la Direzione nello sviluppo e nell’aggiornamento continuo del Piano Annuale di Revisione, basato sulle priorità di valutazione dei rischi; - Progettare e definire programmi di revisione dettagliati per le aree assegnate, garantendo l’allineamento con le metodologie interne e gli standard professionali; - Eseguire in modo indipendente incarichi di revisione su processi amministrativi, contabili, operativi e di conformità, inclusi ma non limitati a: Legge italiana 262/2005, Decreto Legislativo 231/2001, Regolamento Generale sulla Protezione dei Dati, Decreto Legislativo 81/2008 e normative antiriciclaggio; - Utilizzare strumenti e metodologie avanzati, tra cui Data Analytics, Process Mining e soluzioni basate sull’Intelligenza Artificiale, per migliorare l’efficacia della revisione e la generazione di insight; - Redigere report di revisione di alta qualità in linea con gli standard interni, garantendo una corretta documentazione, raccolta di prove e classificazione dei documenti di lavoro; - Monitorare e seguire l’attuazione delle azioni correttive concordate e delle iniziative di miglioramento continuo; - Supportare la preparazione di report periodici per gli organi di governance aziendale, inclusi il Consiglio di Amministrazione, il Collegio Sindacale, il Comitato Controllo e Rischi e l’Organismo di Vigilanza ai sensi del Decreto Legislativo 231; - Contribuire alle attività di valutazione dei rischi a livello aziendale, in linea con framework di riferimento come Enterprise Risk Management e COSO Framework. ## Requisiti - Laurea magistrale in Economia, Ingegneria Gestionale, Giurisprudenza o discipline affini; - 7–8 anni di esperienza in ruoli di Revisione Interna, Rischi o Compliance in organizzazioni strutturate e multinazionali; - Esperienza pregressa presso una Big Four (PwC, EY, KPMG, Deloitte) è considerata un valore aggiunto; - Esperienza internazionale e/o qualifica di Certified Internal Auditor sono considerati vantaggiosi; - Competenza avanzata in Data Analytics, Process Mining e applicazioni emergenti di Intelligenza Artificiale nell’ambito della revisione; - Ottima conoscenza della lingua inglese, sia scritta che parlata. ## Cosa offriamo - Entrare a far parte della nostra Azienda significa lavorare in un ambiente creativo e internazionale, con team di persone motivate dalla curiosità e dalla ricerca dell’eccellenza. - Il motore del nostro successo è l’importanza e il valore che attribuiamo al talento e alla passione delle nostre persone, che portano alla loro crescita professionale. - Il Gruppo Prada promuove un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo, garantendo pari opportunità a tutti i candidati, indipendentemente da genere, etnia, orientamento sessuale, disabilità o altre caratteristiche personali. - Crediamo che la diversità sia un valore e ci impegniamo a costruire un luogo di lavoro equo e rispettoso per tutti. ## Contatto Non sono fornite informazioni di contatto.
descriptionByLocale.en: Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. JOB PURPOSE The role is responsible for planning, executing, and overseeing Group-level internal audit activities, ensuring the effectiveness of governance, risk management, and internal control processes. The position also contributes to ad-hoc strategic and cross-functional projects as required. RESPONSIBILITIES Support Management in the development and continuous update of the annual Audit Plan, based on risk assessment priorities; Design and define detailed audit programs for assigned areas, ensuring alignment with internal methodologies and professional standards; Independently execute audit engagements across administrative, accounting, operational, and compliance processes, including but not limited to Italian Law 262/2005, Legislative Decree 231/2001, General Data Protection Regulation, Legislative Decree 81/2008, and Anti-Money Laundering regulations; Leverage advanced tools and methodologies, including Data Analytics, Process Mining, and AI-based solutions, to enhance audit effectiveness and insight generation; Prepare high-quality audit reports in line with internal standards, ensuring proper documentation, evidence collection, and classification of working papers; Monitor and follow up on the implementation of agreed corrective actions and continuous improvement initiatives; Support the preparation of periodic reporting to corporate governance bodies, including the Board of Directors, Board of Statutory Auditors, Control and Risk Committee, and the Supervisory Body pursuant to Legislative Decree 231; Contribute to enterprise-wide Risk Assessment activities, in alignment with leading frameworks such as Enterprise Risk Management and COSO Framework. KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS Master’s degree in Economics, Management Engineering, Law, or a related field; 7–8 years of experience in Internal Audit, Risk, or Compliance roles within structured and multinational organizations; Previous experience in a Big Four firm (PwC, EY, KPMG, Deloitte) is considered a strong plus; International exposure and/or Certified Internal Auditor qualification are considered advantageous; Strong expertise in Data Analytics, Process Mining, and emerging Artificial Intelligence applications in audit; Fluent English, both written and spoken Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Gegründet 1913 in Italien, basiert die Prada Group auf einer Tradition der Exzellenz und einer Vision der Innovation. Die Gruppe, ein weltweit führender Akteur im Luxussegment, ist in über 45 Ländern mit den Marken PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe und Luna Rossa vertreten und beschäftigt Mitarbeiter aus über 100 Nationalitäten. ## Aufgaben - Unterstützung des Managements bei der Entwicklung und kontinuierlichen Aktualisierung des jährlichen Prüfungsplans basierend auf Risikobewertungsprioritäten; - Erstellung und Definition detaillierter Prüfungsprogramme für zugewiesene Bereiche unter Sicherstellung der Ausrichtung an internen Methoden und Berufsstandards; - Unabhängige Durchführung von Prüfungsaufträgen in administrativen, buchhalterischen, operativen und Compliance-Prozessen, einschließlich, aber nicht beschränkt auf: Italienisches Gesetz 262/2005, Gesetzesdekret 231/2001, Allgemeine Datenschutzverordnung, Gesetzesdekret 81/2008 und Geldwäschevorschriften; - Nutzung fortschrittlicher Tools und Methoden, darunter Data Analytics, Process Mining und KI-basierte Lösungen, zur Steigerung der Prüfungseffektivität und Generierung von Erkenntnissen; - Erstellung hochwertiger Prüfungsberichte gemäß internen Standards unter Sicherstellung einer angemessenen Dokumentation, Beweissammlung und Klassifizierung der Arbeitsunterlagen; - Überwachung und Nachverfolgung der Umsetzung vereinbarter Korrekturmaßnahmen und kontinuierlicher Verbesserungsinitiativen; - Unterstützung bei der Erstellung periodischer Berichte für Unternehmensführungsgremien, einschließlich Vorstand, Aufsichtsrat, Prüfungs- und Risikoausschuss sowie dem Überwachungsorgan gemäß Gesetzesdekret 231; - Beitrag zu unternehmensweiten Risikobewertungsaktivitäten in Ausrichtung mit führenden Frameworks wie Enterprise Risk Management und COSO Framework. ## Anforderungen - Masterabschluss in Wirtschaftswissenschaften, Wirtschaftsingenieurwesen, Jura oder einem verwandten Bereich; - 7–8 Jahre Berufserfahrung in den Bereichen Interne Revision, Risiko oder Compliance in strukturierten und multinationalen Organisationen; - Vorherige Erfahrung bei einer der Big Four (PwC, EY, KPMG, Deloitte) gilt als starker Pluspunkt; - Internationale Erfahrung und/oder die Qualifikation als Certified Internal Auditor gelten als vorteilhaft; - Fundierte Expertise in Data Analytics, Process Mining und aufstrebenden KI-Anwendungen im Prüfungsumfeld; - Fließende Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift. ## Was wir bieten - Bei uns zu arbeiten bedeutet, in einem kreativen und internationalen Umfeld mit Teams zu arbeiten, die von Neugier und dem Streben nach Exzellenz motiviert sind. - Der Antrieb unseres Erfolgs ist die Bedeutung und der Wert, den wir dem Talent und der Leidenschaft unserer Mitarbeiter beimessen, was zu ihrer beruflichen Weiterentwicklung führt. - Die Prada Group fördert ein inklusives Arbeitsumfeld und gewährleistet gleiche Chancen für alle Bewerber unabhängig von Geschlecht, Ethnie, sexueller Orientierung, Behinderung oder anderen persönlichen Merkmalen. - Wir sind überzeugt, dass Vielfalt ein Wert ist, und verpflichten uns, einen fairen und respektvollen Arbeitsplatz für alle zu schaffen. ## Kontakt Es werden keine Kontaktdaten bereitgestellt.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description Fondé en 1913 en Italie, le Groupe Prada s’appuie sur une tradition d’excellence et une vision innovante. Leader mondial du secteur du luxe, le Groupe opère dans plus de 45 pays avec les marques PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe et Luna Rossa, et emploie des collaborateurs issus de plus de 100 nationalités. ## Missions - Soutenir la Direction dans l’élaboration et la mise à jour continue du Plan d’Audit annuel, en fonction des priorités d’évaluation des risques ; - Concevoir et définir des programmes d’audit détaillés pour les domaines attribués, en veillant à leur alignement avec les méthodologies internes et les normes professionnelles ; - Réaliser de manière autonome des missions d’audit sur les processus administratifs, comptables, opérationnels et de conformité, incluant, sans s’y limiter : la Loi italienne 262/2005, le Décret Législatif 231/2001, le Règlement Général sur la Protection des Données, le Décret Législatif 81/2008 et les réglementations anti-blanchiment ; - Utiliser des outils et méthodologies avancés, notamment l’analyse de données (Data Analytics), le Process Mining et des solutions basées sur l’Intelligence Artificielle, pour renforcer l’efficacité de l’audit et la génération d’insights ; - Rédiger des rapports d’audit de haute qualité conformes aux normes internes, en garantissant une documentation appropriée, la collecte de preuves et la classification des documents de travail ; - Assurer le suivi et le contrôle de la mise en œuvre des actions correctives convenues et des initiatives d’amélioration continue ; - Contribuer à la préparation de rapports périodiques pour les organes de gouvernance d’entreprise, y compris le Conseil d’Administration, le Collège des Commissaires aux Comptes, le Comité d’Audit et des Risques, et l’Organisme de Vigilance conformément au Décret Législatif 231 ; - Participer aux activités d’évaluation des risques à l’échelle de l’entreprise, en alignement avec des cadres de référence tels que l’Enterprise Risk Management et le cadre COSO. ## Profil recherché - Master en Économie, Ingénierie de Gestion, Droit ou domaine connexe ; - 7 à 8 ans d’expérience en Audit Interne, Gestion des Risques ou Conformité au sein d’organisations structurées et multinationales ; - Une expérience préalable dans un cabinet Big Four (PwC, EY, KPMG, Deloitte) est considérée comme un atout majeur ; - Une exposition internationale et/ou une certification d’Auditeur Interne (CIA) sont des atouts appréciés ; - Expertise solide en analyse de données (Data Analytics), Process Mining et applications émergentes de l’Intelligence Artificielle dans le domaine de l’audit ; - Maîtrise courante de l’anglais, à l’écrit comme à l’oral. ## Ce que nous offrons - Rejoindre notre entreprise signifie travailler dans un environnement créatif et international, au sein d’équipes motivées par la curiosité et la quête d’excellence. - Le moteur de notre succès réside dans l’importance et la valeur que nous accordons au talent et à la passion de nos collaborateurs, favorisant ainsi leur développement professionnel. - Le Groupe Prada promeut un environnement de travail inclusif, garantissant des opportunités égales à tous les candidats, sans distinction de genre, d’origine ethnique, d’orientation sexuelle, de handicap ou d’autres caractéristiques personnelles. - Nous croyons que la diversité est une valeur et nous nous engageons à construire un lieu de travail équitable et respectueux pour tous. ## Contact Aucune information de contact n’est fournie.

PRADA Stock Controller, Cophenagen
jobs.description:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. 

 
 

 
 

 JOB PURPOSE 

 
 

 
 As Prada Stock Controller, You support the Stock Manager in all the responsibilities related to the warehouse management and in providing services to the Store.

 
 You ensure the correct handling of goods in store, complying with the KPI’s and guidelines and company procedures for the care of the product. You hold yourself accountable to achieve your individual and team target, acting as proactive player in ensuring the best service and responding to the customer needs for both in store and on ecommerce channel.

 
 

 
 

 
 KEY RESPONSIBILITIES 

 
 

 
 
 Ensure the care and protection of the product according to company guidelines
 
 Day-to-day management of goods receipt and storage in line with company procedures and criteria, preparing products to be brought to the sales floor and in special areas while optimizing the timing efficiency
 
 Prepare shop-to-shop and returns transfers in compliance with company guidelines and timelines
 
 Prepare the flow of E-Commerce orders (Prada.com or e-Tailers) making sure to guarantee the required service levels
 
 Prepare the flow of the damaged products, not sellable product (On Hold, Consignment ...), products under repair
 
 Organizes the Packaging and Stationery physically and on the IT systems
 
 Organizes the Display objects system
 
 Participate in the correct management of Uniforms flow
 
 Participate in the correct management of correct flow of Gifts flow
 
 Correct protection and packaging of the product both inside the store and for transfers, including E-Commerce shipments
 
 Ensure that the company guidelines are adopted in the event of theft, especially in terms of communication and documentation produced
 
 Support in the prompt investigation in the event of system negatives
 
 Manage the flow of the product and the related documentation, recording their movement in the IT system
 
 Participate in the organization and execution of the Physical and Cycle Inventories of the finished product and accessory locations (packaging / stationery and Engineering materials) respecting the company timing
 
 Support the management of the warehouse activities related to sales
 
 Ensure security and cleanliness of the warehouse
 
 Support the Stock Manager in optimizing and rationalizing all available spaces (in collaboration with the Store Manager and the Store Operations Manager)
 
 Support Sales Associates in the sales process and collaborates with the Visual Merchandising team in case of need
 
 Maintain contacts and relationships with the providers used
 
 Keep updates and organizes the archive monthly basis
 
 Comply with KPIs updates, guidelines and company procedures from the relevant Store Operations Manager, from the Store Manager or from the Headquarters
 
 
 

 
 

 
 KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS 

 
 

 
 Similar experience within a luxury or premium brand

 
 Understanding of luxury customer service

 
 Experience in building a long-lasting relationship with clients

 
 Being able to work in a team as well as alone

 
 Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

 
 Fluency in English

 

 
 

 
 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. 
 Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. 

 
 

 
 

 JOB PURPOSE 

 
 

 
 As Prada Stock Controller, You support the Stock Manager in all the responsibilities related to the warehouse management and in providing services to the Store.

 
 You ensure the correct handling of goods in store, complying with the KPI’s and guidelines and company procedures for the care of the product. You hold yourself accountable to achieve your individual and team target, acting as proactive player in ensuring the best service and responding to the customer needs for both in store and on ecommerce channel.

 
 

 
 

 
 KEY RESPONSIBILITIES 

 
 

 
 
 Ensure the care and protection of the product according to company guidelines
 
 Day-to-day management of goods receipt and storage in line with company procedures and criteria, preparing products to be brought to the sales floor and in special areas while optimizing the timing efficiency
 
 Prepare shop-to-shop and returns transfers in compliance with company guidelines and timelines
 
 Prepare the flow of E-Commerce orders (Prada.com or e-Tailers) making sure to guarantee the required service levels
 
 Prepare the flow of the damaged products, not sellable product (On Hold, Consignment ...), products under repair
 
 Organizes the Packaging and Stationery physically and on the IT systems
 
 Organizes the Display objects system
 
 Participate in the correct management of Uniforms flow
 
 Participate in the correct management of correct flow of Gifts flow
 
 Correct protection and packaging of the product both inside the store and for transfers, including E-Commerce shipments
 
 Ensure that the company guidelines are adopted in the event of theft, especially in terms of communication and documentation produced
 
 Support in the prompt investigation in the event of system negatives
 
 Manage the flow of the product and the related documentation, recording their movement in the IT system
 
 Participate in the organization and execution of the Physical and Cycle Inventories of the finished product and accessory locations (packaging / stationery and Engineering materials) respecting the company timing
 
 Support the management of the warehouse activities related to sales
 
 Ensure security and cleanliness of the warehouse
 
 Support the Stock Manager in optimizing and rationalizing all available spaces (in collaboration with the Store Manager and the Store Operations Manager)
 
 Support Sales Associates in the sales process and collaborates with the Visual Merchandising team in case of need
 
 Maintain contacts and relationships with the providers used
 
 Keep updates and organizes the archive monthly basis
 
 Comply with KPIs updates, guidelines and company procedures from the relevant Store Operations Manager, from the Store Manager or from the Headquarters
 
 
 

 
 

 
 KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS 

 
 

 
 Similar experience within a luxury or premium brand

 
 Understanding of luxury customer service

 
 Experience in building a long-lasting relationship with clients

 
 Being able to work in a team as well as alone

 
 Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

 
 Fluency in English

 

 
 

 
 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. 
 Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

jobs.title: PRADA Team Manager, Lisbon
jobs.description:
Job summary/Purpose 

 
 As a Team Manager, you will play a pivotal role in driving our store's success by prioritizing team management and development. Your primary responsibilities include leading, training, and coaching your team, proactively driving sales goal overachievement, and ensuring an exceptional client experience. Your dedication as a passionate Brand Ambassador will represent Prada's core values while maintaining the utmost commitment to our Client Promise. 

 
 

 Responsibilities 

 
 

 
 Team Management: 

 
 
 Leadership and growth: Take ownership of guiding, nurturing, and developing your team to their fullest potential while inspiring a culture of excellence, teamwork, and growth 
 
 Performance Excellence: Drive your team to exceed KPI targets while contributing to the overall success of the store (setting goals and managing individual performances) 
 
 Performance Conversations: Collaborate with the Store Manager/Director to conduct regular performance discussions, analyze results, and create actionable plans. 
 
 Feedback and Development: Motivate and support your team with consistent feedback and coaching, ensuring a seamless client experience by identifying individual development needs and partnering with Retail Trainers to tailor development plans 
 
 Client Centric & Product Training: Train your team on all aspects concerning Client Journey, clienteling, storytelling and product knowledge to allow them to meet and exceed business goals 
 
 Talent Acquisition: Participating in identifying, recruiting and onboarding talents in collaboration with the Store Manager 
 
 Positive Work Environment: Lead by example by creating a positive and harmonious work environment, ensuring cooperation within the team and between store leadership 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 Client & Business Development: 

 
 
 Optimized Sales Floor Management : Ensure that business opportunities are maximized through efficient sales floor management, maintaining a visible and consistent presence for your team 
 
 Client Experience: Lead and inspire your team to deliver a superior client experience, adhering to all Client Journey principles to foster long-term client relationships 
 
 CRM and Clienteling: Contribute to enhancing store performance through CRM and clienteling led initiative (training Client Advisors across all clienteling steps including data collection, client outreach, private appointments, re-purchases, VIC engagement and retention) 
 
 Client Base Expansion: Proactively identify opportunities to engage with new clients (prospects) to expand the store's client base 
 
 After Sales: Ensure to provide to clients a unique experience including the after sale process that is an additional service the company provides to maintain items longevity and quality throughout the years. Having clients in the store is always an opportunity increase loyalty and maximize business opportunities. 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 Product Care & Respect of Corporate Guidelines: 

 
 
 Exemplary Product Care: Lead by example, ensuring that the team operates with the highest level of care and respect for the product 
 
 Policy Adherence: Ensure strict compliance with all policies and procedures, providing support to the team in daily operational tasks 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 Category Performance: 

 
 

 
 
 Performance Monitoring : Monitoring the performance of assigned categories, actively proposing action plans to achieve targets 
 
 
 

 
 
 Collaborative Feedback : Collaborate with Retail Merchandising teams, offering effective feedback on products, stock situations, and specific requests to drive business growth 
 
 
 

 
 
 Visual Merchandising : Collaborate with the Visual Merchandising team to maximize category potential while ensuring the store's image adheres to established guidelines 
 
 
 

 
 
 Stockroom Organization : Collaborate with Operations team to ensure BOH structure and layout is always structured to maximizes efficiency and selling opportunities 
 
 These activities are intended to be illustrative and not exhaustive.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione In qualità di Responsabile Team, rivestirai un ruolo fondamentale nel successo del nostro negozio, concentrandoti sulla gestione e lo sviluppo del team. Le tue principali responsabilità includeranno la leadership, la formazione e il coaching della tua squadra, il raggiungimento proattivo degli obiettivi di vendita e la garanzia di un’esperienza cliente eccezionale. Il tuo impegno come Brand Ambassador appassionato rappresenterà i valori fondamentali di Prada, mantenendo al contempo un impegno incrollabile verso la nostra Promessa al Cliente. ## Responsabilità ### Gestione del Team - Leadership e crescita: Assumi la responsabilità di guidare, coltivare e sviluppare il tuo team al massimo delle sue potenzialità, ispirando una cultura di eccellenza, lavoro di squadra e crescita - Eccellenza nelle performance: Guida il tuo team a superare gli obiettivi KPI, contribuendo al successo complessivo del negozio (impostazione degli obiettivi e gestione delle performance individuali) - Conversazioni sulle performance: Collabora con il Store Manager/Direttore per condurre regolari discussioni sulle performance, analizzare i risultati e creare piani d’azione concreti - Feedback e sviluppo: Motiva e supporta il tuo team con feedback e coaching costanti, garantendo un’esperienza cliente senza soluzione di continuità identificando le esigenze di sviluppo individuale e collaborando con i Retail Trainer per personalizzare i piani di sviluppo - Formazione client-centrica e prodotto: Forma il tuo team su tutti gli aspetti relativi al Customer Journey, clienteling, storytelling e conoscenza dei prodotti per consentire loro di raggiungere e superare gli obiettivi aziendali - Acquisizione di talenti: Partecipa all’identificazione, reclutamento e inserimento di nuovi talenti in collaborazione con il Store Manager - Ambiente di lavoro positivo: Da’ l’esempio creando un ambiente di lavoro positivo e armonioso, garantendo la cooperazione all’interno del team e tra la leadership del negozio ### Sviluppo Clienti e Business - Gestione ottimizzata del piano vendite: Assicurati che le opportunità di business siano massimizzate attraverso una gestione efficiente del piano vendite, mantenendo una presenza visibile e costante per il tuo team - Esperienza cliente: Guida e ispira il tuo team a offrire un’esperienza cliente superiore, rispettando tutti i principi del Customer Journey per coltivare relazioni clienti a lungo termine - CRM e clienteling: Contribuisci a migliorare le performance del negozio attraverso iniziative guidate da CRM e clienteling (formazione dei Client Advisor su tutti i passaggi del clienteling, inclusa la raccolta dati, il contatto con i clienti, gli appuntamenti privati, gli acquisti ripetuti, l’engagement dei VIC e la fidelizzazione) - Espansione della base clienti: Identifica proattivamente opportunità per coinvolgere nuovi clienti (prospect) al fine di ampliare la base clienti del negozio - Post-vendita: Assicurati di offrire ai clienti un’esperienza unica, incluso il processo post-vendita, che rappresenta un servizio aggiuntivo che l’azienda fornisce per mantenere la longevità e la qualità degli articoli nel corso degli anni. Avere i clienti in negozio è sempre un’opportunità per aumentare la fedeltà e massimizzare le opportunità di business ### Cura dei Prodotti e Rispetto delle Linee Guida Aziendali - Eccellenza nella cura dei prodotti: Da’ l’esempio, assicurandoti che il team operi con il massimo livello di cura e rispetto per il prodotto - Adesione alle politiche: Garantisci una rigorosa conformità a tutte le politiche e procedure, fornendo supporto al team nelle attività operative quotidiane ### Performance di Categoria - Monitoraggio delle performance: Monitora le performance delle categorie assegnate, proponendo proattivamente piani d’azione per raggiungere gli obiettivi - Feedback collaborativo: Collabora con i team di Retail Merchandising, fornendo feedback efficaci sui prodotti, le situazioni di stock e richieste specifiche per guidare la crescita del business - Visual Merchandising: Collabora con il team di Visual Merchandising per massimizzare il potenziale delle categorie, garantendo che l’immagine del negozio sia in linea con le linee guida stabilite - Organizzazione del magazzino: Collabora con il team Operations per assicurarti che la struttura e la disposizione del magazzino siano sempre organizzate per massimizzare l’efficienza e le opportunità di vendita

descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Als Teamleiter spielen Sie eine zentrale Rolle für den Erfolg unseres Ladens, indem Sie sich auf die Führung und Entwicklung des Teams konzentrieren. Ihre Hauptaufgaben umfassen die Leitung, Schulung und Förderung Ihres Teams, die proaktive Steigerung der Verkaufsziele sowie die Gewährleistung eines herausragenden Kundenerlebnisses. Ihr Engagement als leidenschaftlicher Markenbotschafter wird die Kernwerte von Prada vertreten und gleichzeitig unser Versprechen an den Kunden mit höchster Priorität erfüllen. ## Verantwortlichkeiten ### Teamführung - Führung und Wachstum: Übernehmen Sie die Verantwortung für die Anleitung, Förderung und Entwicklung Ihres Teams, um dessen volles Potenzial auszuschöpfen, und inspirieren Sie eine Kultur der Exzellenz, Teamarbeit und des Wachstums - Leistungsstärke: Führen Sie Ihr Team dazu, die KPI-Ziele zu übertreffen und zum Gesamterfolg des Ladens beizutragen (Zielsetzung und Management der individuellen Leistungen) - Leistungsgespräche: Arbeiten Sie mit dem Store Manager/Leiter zusammen, um regelmäßige Leistungsgespräche zu führen, Ergebnisse zu analysieren und umsetzbare Pläne zu erstellen - Feedback und Entwicklung: Motivieren und unterstützen Sie Ihr Team durch kontinuierliches Feedback und Coaching, um ein nahtloses Kundenerlebnis zu gewährleisten, indem Sie individuelle Entwicklungsbedürfnisse identifizieren und mit Retail-Trainern zusammenarbeiten, um maßgeschneiderte Entwicklungspläne zu erstellen - Kundenorientierte und Produkt-Schulung: Schulen Sie Ihr Team in allen Aspekten des Customer Journeys, Clienteling, Storytelling und Produktwissen, um ihnen zu ermöglichen, die Geschäftsziele zu erreichen und zu übertreffen - Talentakquise: Beteiligen Sie sich an der Identifizierung, Rekrutierung und Einarbeitung von Talenten in Zusammenarbeit mit dem Store Manager - Positives Arbeitsumfeld: Seien Sie ein Vorbild und schaffen Sie ein positives und harmonisches Arbeitsumfeld, das die Zusammenarbeit innerhalb des Teams und zwischen der Ladensführung fördert ### Kunden- und Geschäftsentwicklung - Optimiertes Verkaufsflächenmanagement: Stellen Sie sicher, dass Geschäftschancen durch effizientes Verkaufsflächenmanagement maximiert werden, und halten Sie eine sichtbare und konsistente Präsenz für Ihr Team aufrecht - Kundenerlebnis: Führen und inspirieren Sie Ihr Team, um ein herausragendes Kundenerlebnis zu bieten, und halten Sie sich dabei an alle Prinzipien des Customer Journeys, um langfristige Kundenbeziehungen zu fördern - CRM und Clienteling: Tragen Sie zur Verbesserung der Ladenleistung durch CRM- und Clienteling-gesteuerte Initiativen bei (Schulung von Kundenberatern in allen Clienteling-Schritten, einschließlich Datenerfassung, Kundenansprache, private Termine, Wiederkäufe, VIC-Einbindung und Kundenbindung) - Erweiterung der Kundenbasis: Identifizieren Sie proaktiv Möglichkeiten, um neue Kunden (Interessenten) anzusprechen und die Kundenbasis des Ladens zu erweitern - Nach dem Verkauf: Stellen Sie sicher, dass Kunden ein einzigartiges Erlebnis erhalten, einschließlich des Nachverkaufsprozesses, der ein zusätzlicher Service des Unternehmens ist, um die Langlebigkeit und Qualität der Artikel über die Jahre hinweg zu erhalten. Kunden im Laden zu haben, ist immer eine Gelegenheit, die Loyalität zu steigern und Geschäftschancen zu maximieren ### Produktpflege und Einhaltung der Unternehmensrichtlinien - Vorbildliche Produktpflege: Seien Sie ein Vorbild und stellen Sie sicher, dass das Team mit höchster Sorgfalt und Respekt für das Produkt arbeitet - Einhaltung von Richtlinien: Gewährleisten Sie die strikte Einhaltung aller Richtlinien und Verfahren und unterstützen Sie das Team bei täglichen operativen Aufgaben ### Kategorie-Performance - Leistungsüberwachung: Überwachen Sie die Performance der zugewiesenen Kategorien und schlagen Sie proaktiv Maßnahmenpläne vor, um die Ziele zu erreichen - Kollaboratives Feedback: Arbeiten Sie mit den Retail-Merchandising-Teams zusammen und geben Sie effektives Feedback zu Produkten, Lagerbeständen und spezifischen Anforderungen, um das Geschäftswachstum voranzutreiben - Visual Merchandising: Arbeiten Sie mit dem Visual-Merchandising-Team zusammen, um das Potenzial der Kategorien zu maximieren und gleichzeitig sicherzustellen, dass das Erscheinungsbild des Ladens den festgelegten Richtlinien entspricht - Lagerorganisation: Arbeiten Sie mit dem Operations-Team zusammen, um sicherzustellen, dass die Struktur und Anordnung des Back-of-House (BOH) stets so organisiert ist, dass Effizienz und Verkaufschancen maximiert werden
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description En tant que Responsable d'équipe, vous jouerez un rôle clé dans la réussite de notre magasin en vous concentrant sur la gestion et le développement de l'équipe. Vos principales responsabilités incluront le leadership, la formation et le coaching de votre équipe, l'atteinte proactive des objectifs de vente et la garantie d'une expérience client exceptionnelle. Votre engagement en tant qu'ambassadeur de la marque Prada représentera les valeurs fondamentales de Prada tout en maintenant un engagement absolu envers notre Promesse Client. ## Responsabilités ### Gestion d'équipe - Leadership et croissance : Prenez la responsabilité de guider, cultiver et développer votre équipe pour qu'elle atteigne son plein potentiel, en inspirant une culture d'excellence, de travail d'équipe et de croissance - Excellence des performances : Guidez votre équipe pour qu'elle dépasse les objectifs KPI, contribuant ainsi au succès global du magasin (fixation des objectifs et gestion des performances individuelles) - Entretiens de performance : Collaborez avec le Responsable de magasin/Directeur pour mener des entretiens de performance réguliers, analyser les résultats et créer des plans d'action concrets - Feedback et développement : Motivez et soutenez votre équipe grâce à un feedback et un coaching constants, en garantissant une expérience client fluide en identifiant les besoins individuels de développement et en collaborant avec les formateurs Retail pour adapter les plans de développement - Formation centrée client et produit : Formez votre équipe sur tous les aspects du parcours client, du clienteling, du storytelling et de la connaissance des produits afin de lui permettre d'atteindre et de dépasser les objectifs commerciaux - Acquisition de talents : Participez à l'identification, au recrutement et à l'intégration de nouveaux talents en collaboration avec le Responsable de magasin - Environnement de travail positif : Montrez l'exemple en créant un environnement de travail positif et harmonieux, en favorisant la coopération au sein de l'équipe et entre les dirigeants du magasin ### Développement client et commercial - Gestion optimisée du plan de vente : Assurez-vous que les opportunités commerciales sont maximisées grâce à une gestion efficace du plan de vente, en maintenant une présence visible et constante pour votre équipe - Expérience client : Guidez et inspirez votre équipe pour offrir une expérience client supérieure, en respectant tous les principes du parcours client afin de cultiver des relations clients à long terme - CRM et clienteling : Contribuez à améliorer les performances du magasin grâce à des initiatives guidées par le CRM et le clienteling (formation des conseillers clients sur toutes les étapes du clienteling, y compris la collecte de données, la prospection client, les rendez-vous privés, les réachats, l'engagement des VIC et la fidélisation) - Expansion de la base clients : Identifiez de manière proactive des opportunités pour engager de nouveaux clients (prospects) afin d'élargir la base clients du magasin - Après-vente : Assurez-vous d'offrir aux clients une expérience unique, y compris le processus de service après-vente, qui est un service supplémentaire que l'entreprise propose pour maintenir la longévité et la qualité des articles au fil des années. Avoir des clients dans le magasin est toujours une opportunité d'augmenter la fidélité et de maximiser les opportunités commerciales ### Soin des produits et respect des directives de l'entreprise - Excellence dans le soin des produits : Montrez l'exemple en veillant à ce que l'équipe opère avec le plus haut niveau de soin et de respect pour le produit - Respect des politiques : Garantissez le strict respect de toutes les politiques et procédures, en apportant un soutien à l'équipe dans les tâches opérationnelles quotidiennes ### Performance par catégorie - Surveillance des performances : Surveillez les performances des catégories assignées, en proposant de manière proactive des plans d'action pour atteindre les objectifs - Feedback collaboratif : Collaborez avec les équipes de Retail Merchandising, en fournissant un feedback efficace sur les produits, les situations de stock et les demandes spécifiques pour stimuler la croissance commerciale - Merchandising visuel : Collaborez avec l'équipe de Merchandising visuel pour maximiser le potentiel des catégories tout en garantissant que l'image du magasin respecte les directives établies - Organisation des réserves : Collaborez avec l'équipe des Opérations pour garantir que la structure et l'aménagement des réserves (BOH) sont toujours organisés de manière à maximiser l'efficacité et les opportunités de vente

jobs.description:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. 

 
 

 
 

 JOB PURPOSE 

 
 

 
 As the Brand Store Manager, you are a passionate Brand Ambassador and a business leader, who conveys the Brand philosophy and values to the local market, the Store team and to the final Client. 

 
 

 
 

 
 RESPONSIBILITIES 

 
 

 
 Leading the Business 

 
 
 Drive Store Team to exceed Financial targets and maximize sales performances, determining the success of the entire store 
 
 Propose and develop action plans, through careful analysis of performance 
 
 Drive the Store team to exceed their KPI targets, including cross selling and up selling among product categories 

 
 
 
 Client Development 

 
 
 Place the Client above all, leading by example to create a welcoming environment and to ensure the Team strives to meet their every need and request 
 
 Foster a Client centric mindset developing and maintaining solid Client relationships and enforcing meaningful after sales experiences 
 
 Guarantee an excellent Client satisfaction and the highest level of Client service through the execution of the “Brand Selling Ceremony” 
 
 
 

 
 Team Management 

 
 
 Act as a strong Staff motivator, promoting team spırıt through effective communication, and cultivating a positive and energetic environment, even to the eyes of the Client 
 
 Encourage the exchange of information within the team and proactively develop morning briefing on specific topics 
 
 Master fully all company tools and applications including IT and digital, and ensure team is constantly informed of relevant updates 
 
 Understand the needs and priorities, train and inspire the Store team on product knowledge, sales techniques, Client Services, and Company policies and procedures 
 
 
 

 
 Boutique Care 

 
 
 Lead by example to ensure the Team operate with the highest level of care and respect for the Product, evident in every ceremony or procedure 
 
 Ensure display attracts Clients and maximizes sales, in accordance with Company guidelines – proactively seek VM and MD support based on store needs 
 
 Provıde feedback and suggestions when necessary to the Visual Merchandising and the Retail Merchandising departments 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS 
 

 
 At least 8 years of experience 

 
 Strong problem-solving and organizational skills 

 
 Ability to manage multiple priorities and coordinate across functions 

 
 Excellent communication skills and team spirit 

 
 Fluency in both Italian and English 

 

 
 

 
 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. 
 Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Fondata nel 1913 in Italia, il Gruppo Prada è stato costruito su una tradizione di eccellenza e con una visione di innovazione. Il Gruppo, leader mondiale nel settore del lusso, opera in più di 45 paesi con i marchi PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church's, Car Shoe e Luna Rossa, e ha dipendenti di oltre 100 nazionalità. ## Mansioni ## Brand Store Manager Come Brand Store Manager, sei un ambasciatore appassionato del marchio e un leader aziendale, che trasmette la filosofia e i valori del marchio al mercato locale, al team del negozio e al cliente finale. ## Responsabilità - Leading the Business - Guidare il team del negozio a superare gli obiettivi finanziari e massimizzare le prestazioni di vendita, determinando il successo dell'intero negozio - Proporre e sviluppare piani d'azione, attraverso un'attenta analisi delle prestazioni - Guidare il team del negozio a superare i loro obiettivi KPI, inclusa la vendita incrociata e la vendita di prodotti tra categorie - Client Development - Mettere il cliente al di sopra di tutto, guidando con l'esempio per creare un ambiente accogliente e garantire che il team si impegni a soddisfare ogni esigenza e richiesta del cliente - Favorire una mentalità centrata sul cliente, sviluppando e mantenendo solide relazioni con i clienti e garantendo esperienze di vendita significative dopo la vendita - Garantire un'elevata soddisfazione del cliente e il massimo livello di servizio al cliente attraverso l'esecuzione della "Cerimonia di vendita del marchio" - Team Management - Agire da forte motivatore del personale, promuovendo lo spirito di squadra attraverso una comunicazione efficace e creando un ambiente positivo ed energetico, anche agli occhi del cliente - Incoraggiare la condivisione di informazioni all'interno del team e sviluppare proattivamente briefing mattutini su argomenti specifici - Padroneggiare tutti gli strumenti e le applicazioni aziendali, inclusi IT e digitali, e garantire che il team sia costantemente informato sugli aggiornamenti pertinenti - Comprendere le esigenze e le priorità, formare e ispirare il team del negozio sulla conoscenza del prodotto, sulle tecniche di vendita, sui servizi al cliente e sulle politiche e procedure aziendali - Boutique Care - Guidare con l'esempio per garantire che il team operi con il massimo livello di cura e rispetto per il prodotto, evidente in ogni cerimonia o procedura - Garantire che la vetrina attiri i clienti e massimizzi le vendite, in conformità con le linee guida aziendali - cercare proattivamente supporto da VM e MD in base alle esigenze del negozio - Fornire feedback e suggerimenti quando necessario ai dipartimenti di Visual Merchandising e Retail Merchandising ## Requisiti - Almeno 8 anni di esperienza - Forti capacità di problem-solving e organizzazione - Capacità di gestire multiple priorità e coordinare tra funzioni - Eccellenti capacità di comunicazione e spirito di squadra - Fluente in entrambe le lingue italiana e inglese ## Cosa offriamo Unirsi alla nostra azienda significa lavorare in un ambiente creativo e internazionale, con team di persone motivate dalla curiosità e dalla ricerca dell'eccellenza. Il motore del nostro successo è l'importanza e il valore che attribuiamo al talento e alla passione delle nostre persone, portando alla loro crescita professionale. Il Gruppo Prada promuove un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo, garantendo pari opportunità per tutti i candidati, indipendentemente dal genere, dall'etnia, dall'orientamento sessuale, dalla disabilità o da altre caratteristiche personali. Crediamo che la diversità sia un valore e ci impegniamo a costruire un luogo di lavoro equo e rispettoso per tutti. ## Contatto

descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Gegründet 1913 in Italien, wurde die Prada Group auf einer Tradition von Exzellenz und mit einer Vision von Innovation aufgebaut. Die Gruppe, ein weltweiter Marktführer im Luxussegment, operiert in mehr als 45 Ländern mit den Marken PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church's, Car Shoe und Luna Rossa und beschäftigt Mitarbeiter aus über 100 Nationalitäten. ## Aufgaben ## Brand Store Manager Als Brand Store Manager sind Sie ein leidenschaftlicher Markenbotschafter und ein Unternehmensführer, der die Philosophie und die Werte der Marke an den lokalen Markt, das Store-Team und den Endkunden übermittelt. ## Verantwortlichkeiten - Leading the Business - Das Store-Team dazu bringen, die finanziellen Ziele zu übertreffen und die Verkaufsleistungen zu maximieren, um den Erfolg des gesamten Stores zu bestimmen - Aktionspläne vorschlagen und entwickeln, durch sorgfältige Analyse der Leistungen - Das Store-Team dazu bringen, ihre KPI-Ziele zu übertreffen, einschließlich Cross-Selling und Upselling zwischen Produktkategorien - Client Development - Den Kunden über alles stellen, indem Sie mit gutem Beispiel vorangehen, um eine einladende Umgebung zu schaffen und sicherzustellen, dass das Team sich bemüht, jede Notwendigkeit und Anfrage des Kunden zu erfüllen - Eine klientenzentrierte Denkweise fördern, indem Sie solide Kundenbeziehungen aufbauen und aufrechterhalten und sinnvolle Nachverkaufserfahrungen durchsetzen - Eine ausgezeichnete Kundenzufriedenheit und den höchsten Level an Kundenservice durch die Ausführung der "Markenverkaufszermonie" gewährleisten - Team Management - Als starker Mitarbeiter motivator fungieren, indem Sie Teamspirit durch effektive Kommunikation fördern und eine positive und energetische Umgebung schaffen, auch für die Kunden - Den Informationsaustausch innerhalb des Teams fördern und proaktiv Morgenbriefings zu spezifischen Themen entwickeln - Alle Unternehmenswerkzeuge und -anwendungen, einschließlich IT und digital, beherrschen und sicherstellen, dass das Team ständig über relevante Updates informiert ist - Die Bedürfnisse und Prioritäten verstehen, das Store-Team in Produktkenntnissen, Verkaufstechniken, Kundenservice und Unternehmensrichtlinien und -verfahren schulen und inspirieren - Boutique Care - Mit gutem Beispiel vorangehen, um sicherzustellen, dass das Team mit dem höchsten Level an Sorgfalt und Respekt für das Produkt arbeitet, offensichtlich in jeder Zeremonie oder Prozedur - Sicherstellen, dass die Schaufensterdekoration Kunden anzieht und den Verkauf maximiert, in Übereinstimmung mit Unternehmensrichtlinien - proaktiv VM- und MD-Unterstützung basierend auf den Bedürfnissen des Stores suchen - Feedback und Vorschläge geben, wenn notwendig, an die Abteilungen Visual Merchandising und Retail Merchandising ## Anforderungen - Mindestens 8 Jahre Erfahrung - Starke Problemlösungs- und Organisationsfähigkeiten - Fähigkeit, mehrere Prioritäten zu verwalten und über Funktionen hinweg zu koordinieren - Ausgezeichnete Kommunikationsfähigkeiten und Teamspirit - Fließend in beiden Sprachen, Italienisch und Englisch ## Was bieten wir Der Beitritt zu unserem Unternehmen bedeutet, in einer kreativen und internationalen Umgebung zu arbeiten, mit Teams von Menschen, die durch Neugier und die Suche nach Exzellenz motiviert sind. Der Motor unseres Erfolgs ist die Bedeutung und der Wert, den wir auf das Talent und die Leidenschaft unserer Mitarbeiter legen, was zu ihrem eigenen beruflichen Wachstum führt. Die Prada Group fördert eine inklusive Arbeitsumgebung, die gleiche Chancen für alle Kandidaten gewährleistet, unabhängig von Geschlecht, Ethnizität, sexueller Orientierung, Behinderung oder anderen persönlichen Merkmalen. Wir glauben, dass Vielfalt ein Wert ist und verpflichten uns, einen fairen und respektvollen Arbeitsplatz für alle zu schaffen. ## Kontakt
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description Fondée en 1913 en Italie, le Groupe Prada a été construit sur une tradition d'excellence et avec une vision de l'innovation. Le Groupe, un leader mondial dans le secteur du luxe, opère dans plus de 45 pays avec les marques PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church's, Car Shoe et Luna Rossa, et compte des employés de plus de 100 nationalités. ## Missions ## Brand Store Manager En tant que Brand Store Manager, vous êtes un ambassadeur passionné de la marque et un leader d'entreprise, qui transmet la philosophie et les valeurs de la marque au marché local, à l'équipe du magasin et au client final. ## Responsabilités - Leading the Business - Diriger l'équipe du magasin pour dépasser les objectifs financiers et maximiser les performances de vente, en déterminant le succès de l'ensemble du magasin - Proposer et développer des plans d'action, à travers une analyse minutieuse des performances - Diriger l'équipe du magasin pour dépasser leurs objectifs KPI, y compris la vente croisée et la vente de produits entre catégories - Client Development - Placer le client au-dessus de tout, en donnant l'exemple pour créer un environnement accueillant et pour garantir que l'équipe s'efforce de répondre à chaque besoin et demande du client - Favoriser une mentalité centrée sur le client, en développant et en maintenant des relations solides avec les clients et en garantissant des expériences de vente significatives après-vente - Garantir une excellente satisfaction client et le plus haut niveau de service client à travers l'exécution de la "Cérémonie de vente de la marque" - Team Management - Agir en tant que motivateur fort du personnel, en promouvant l'esprit d'équipe à travers une communication efficace et en créant un environnement positif et énergétique, même aux yeux du client - Encourager l'échange d'informations au sein de l'équipe et développer de manière proactive des briefings matinaux sur des sujets spécifiques - Maîtriser tous les outils et applications de l'entreprise, y compris IT et numériques, et garantir que l'équipe est constamment informée des mises à jour pertinentes - Comprendre les besoins et les priorités, former et inspirer l'équipe du magasin sur la connaissance du produit, les techniques de vente, les services client et les politiques et procédures de l'entreprise - Boutique Care - Donner l'exemple pour garantir que l'équipe opère avec le plus haut niveau de soin et de respect pour le produit, évident dans chaque cérémonie ou procédure - Garantir que la vitrine attire les clients et maximise les ventes, conformément aux directives de l'entreprise - rechercher de manière proactive un soutien VM et MD en fonction des besoins du magasin - Fournir des commentaires et des suggestions lorsque nécessaire aux départements de Visual Merchandising et de Retail Merchandising ## Exigences - Au moins 8 ans d'expérience - Fortes compétences en résolution de problèmes et en organisation - Capacité à gérer de multiples priorités et à coordonner entre les fonctions - Excellentes compétences en communication et esprit d'équipe - Courant dans les deux langues, français et anglais ## Ce que nous offrons Rejoindre notre entreprise signifie travailler dans un environnement créatif et international, avec des équipes de personnes motivées par la curiosité et la quête de l'excellence. Le moteur de notre succès est l'importance et la valeur que nous accordons au talent et à la passion de nos employés, conduisant à leur propre croissance professionnelle. Le Groupe Prada promeut un environnement de travail inclusif, garantissant l'égalité des chances pour tous les candidats, quelle que soit leur sexe, leur origine ethnique, leur orientation sexuelle, leur handicap ou d'autres caractéristiques personnelles. Nous croyons que la diversité est une valeur et nous nous engageons à créer un lieu de travail équitable et respectueux pour tous. ## Contact

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Fondato nel 1913 in Italia, il Gruppo Prada è stato costruito su una tradizione di eccellenza e con una visione dell'innovazione. Il Gruppo, leader mondiale nel settore del lusso, opera in oltre 45 paesi con i marchi PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe e Luna Rossa, e ha dipendenti di oltre 100 nazionalità. ## Mansioni Come Client Advisor, garantisci una straordinaria e memorabile esperienza di cliente di lusso, ponendo il Cliente soprattutto, scoprendo le proprie esigenze e aspettative, promuovendo relazioni significative, servendo come Brand Ambassador. Voi trasmettete e promuovete la filosofia e i valori del marchio ai clienti finali che li guidano nel mondo dei nostri marchi. Si tiene conto di raggiungere il vostro obiettivo di vendita individuale e di squadra, che agisce come giocatore proattivo nel garantire il miglior servizio e rispondere alle esigenze del cliente sia in negozio che sul canale di ecommerce. ## Responsabilità - Agite come un vero e proprio ambasciatore di marca, sfruttando il tocco umano per creare un ambiente accogliente e stimolante che guidi il coinvolgimento del cliente e porti i valori del marchio alla vita; - Lavorare come team player e partner con colleghi, promuovere la comunicazione aperta e costruttiva, per garantire una costante esperienza eccezionale e contribuire a un ambiente di lavoro positivo, abbracciando i valori di Diversità e inclusione. - Abbracciare comportamenti di leadership dimostrando un atteggiamento positivo e la capacità di lavorare in team, mostrando adattabilità alle esigenze del business. - Posizionare il cliente al centro, creare un ambiente accogliente e sforzarsi di soddisfare le loro esigenze e richieste, fornendo loro un servizio di eccellenza in conformità alla “città di viaggio cliente”; - essere guidato per superare i singoli obiettivi di vendita e massimizzare le proprie prestazioni di vendita contribuendo al successo dell'intero negozio; - Essere guidato per superare gli obiettivi KPI, garantendo la massima qualità delle vendite e del servizio clienti; - Dimostrare una conoscenza eccellente delle tendenze dei prodotti così come i nostri marchi ## Requisiti - Passione per la costruzione di relazioni di lunga durata con clienti e colleghi - Problem solving, curiosità e interesse per il lusso / moda - L'esperienza in un ambiente di lusso o premium retail è un plus - Essere in grado di lavorare in team, così come da solo - Ottima comunicazione e competenze interpersonali - Fluent parlato inglese atteso ## Cosa offrendo la nostra azienda significa lavorare in un ambiente creativo e internazionale, con team di persone motivate dalla curiosità e la ricerca di eccellenza. Il motore del nostro successo è l'importanza e il valore che mettiamo sul talento e sulla passione della nostra gente che porta alla propria crescita professionale. Prada Group promuove un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo, garantendo pari opportunità per tutti i candidati, indipendentemente dal sesso, dall'etnia, dall'orientamento sessuale, dalla disabilità o da altre caratteristiche personali. Crediamo che la diversità sia un valore e ci impegniamo a costruire un posto di lavoro giusto e rispettoso per tutti. ## Contatto (senza informazioni di contatto fornite)
descriptionByLocale.en: Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. JOB PURPOSE As Client Advisor, you guarantee an extraordinary and memorable luxury client experience, placing the Client above all, discovering their needs and expectations, fostering meaningful relationships, serving as a Brand Ambassador. You convey and promote the Brand philosophy and Values to the final Clients guiding them into the world our brands. You hold yourself accountable to achieve your individual and team sales target, acting as proactive player in ensuring the best service and responding to the client needs both in store and on ecommerce channel. RESPONSIBILITIES Act as a true brand ambassador, leveraging the human touch to create a welcoming and inspiring environment that drives client engagement and brings the brand’s values to life; Work as a team player and partner with fellow colleagues, foster open and constructive communication, to ensure consistent exceptional experience and contribute to a positive working environment, embracing Diversity and Inclusion values. Embrace leadership behaviors demonstrating a positive attitude and ability to work in team, showing adaptability to the needs of the business. Place the Client at the center, creating a welcoming environment and striving to meet their every need and request, providing them with an excellence service in accordance to the “client journey ceremony”; Be driven to exceed individual sales targets and maximize own sales performances contributing to the success of the entire store; Be driven to exceed KPI goals, ensuring the highest quality of sales and client service; Demonstrate an excellent knowledge of the products as well as our brands, culture and DNA; Build and maintain an ample knowledge of the world of luxury fashion by being constantly informed on fashion trends and competitors, with the purpose to be able to discuss them with the clients and to give advises; Take ownership of resolving Client complaints liaising with the line manager and Client Service team, when necessary; Operate with the highest level of care and respect for the Products; Utilize Company digital tools actively to offer a complete and integrated luxury experience; Capture Client data into the Company CRM with the purpose of connecting to the client, maintaining and developing the relationships (when CRM campaigns will be activated) to offer a personalized approach and develop future opportunities; Embrace and promote the Omni Channel mindset; Host and conduct client appointments either in presence or leveraging technology to do virtual meeting; Work in synergy with the Back of House, participating to the daily operations of the store and preserving the stock room organized; Act in compliance with Company operational and stock procedures, ensuring the safeguarding of Company assets, cash handling (as required, in line with store leadership requests), inventory, logistics and all key reporting activities required by Head Office, while proactively executing Company policies and procedures. KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS Passion for building long-lasting relationships with clients and peers Problem solving, curiosity and interest in luxury/fashion Experience in a luxury or premium retail environment is a plus Being able to work in team, as well as alone Excellent communication and interpersonal skills Fluent spoken English expected Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione Fondé en 1913 en Italie, le groupe Prada a été construit sur une tradition d'excellence et avec une vision d'innovation. Le Groupe, leader mondial du secteur du luxe, opère dans plus de 45 pays avec les marques PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church, Car Shoe et Luna Rossa, et compte plus de 100 employés de nationalités. ## Mansioni En tant que conseiller client, vous garantissez une expérience client de luxe extraordinaire et mémorable, en plaçant le client avant tout, en découvrant leurs besoins et attentes, en favorisant des relations significatives, en servant comme ambassadeur de marque. Vous transmettez et faites la promotion de la philosophie et des valeurs de la marque aux clients finaux les guidant dans le monde de nos marques. Vous vous tenez responsable d'atteindre votre objectif de vente individuelle et d'équipe, agissant comme un acteur proactif pour assurer le meilleur service et répondre aux besoins du client à la fois en magasin et sur le canal de commerce électronique. ## Responsabilità - Agir en tant que véritable ambassadeur de marque, en tirant parti de la touche humaine pour créer un environnement accueillant et inspirant qui stimule l'engagement des clients et donne vie aux valeurs de la marque; - Travailler en tant que joueur d'équipe et partenaire avec ses collègues, favoriser une communication ouverte et constructive, assurer une expérience exceptionnelle cohérente et contribuer à un environnement de travail positif, en adoptant les valeurs de diversité et d'inclusion. - Embrassez des comportements de leadership démontrant une attitude positive et une capacité de travailler en équipe, montrant une capacité d'adaptation aux besoins de l'entreprise. - Mettre le Client au centre, créer un environnement accueillant et s'efforcer de répondre à tous leurs besoins et à toutes leurs demandes, en leur fournissant un service d'excellence conformément à la cérémonie du voyage client ; ## Requisiti - Passion pour l'établissement de relations durables avec les clients et les pairs - Résolution de problèmes, curiosité et intérêt pour le luxe / mode - Expérience dans un environnement de luxe ou de détail haut de gamme est un plus - Être capable de travailler en équipe, ainsi que seul - Excellente communication et compétences interpersonnelles - Anglais parlé fluide attendu ## Cosa offriamo Joindre notre entreprise signifie travailler dans un environnement créatif et international, avec des équipes de personnes motivées par la curiosité et la quête d'excellence. Le moteur de notre succès est l'importance et la valeur que nous accordons au talent et à la passion de nos gens qui mènent à leur propre développement professionnel. Prada Group favorise un milieu de travail inclusif, assurant l'égalité des chances pour tous les candidats, indépendamment du sexe, de l'origine ethnique, de l'orientation sexuelle, du handicap ou d'autres caractéristiques personnelles. Nous croyons que la diversité est une valeur et nous sommes déterminés à bâtir un milieu de travail juste et respectueux pour tous. ## Contatto (pas de coordonnées fournies)
